label: Save for Claude Restart
text: Please save everything to memory, so I can stop Claude code and then restart from exactly the same place.

label: Summarize This Code
text: Please provide a brief summary of what this code does, its inputs, outputs, and any important side effects.

label: Find Bugs in This Code
text: Please review this code for bugs, edge cases, and potential issues. List each issue with its severity and a suggested fix.

label: Write Tests for This
text: Please write comprehensive tests for this code, covering normal cases, edge cases, and error conditions.

label: Explain This Error
text: Please explain what this error means, what likely caused it, and how to fix it.

label: Create Git Repo
text: Create a new repo on GitHub using the GITHUB_TOKEN env var.  Then, create a deploy key that accesses only this repository, and save it within this directory.  Commit all appropriate files from this directory to the new repo.  As a standing order, always commit and push and save to memory whenever a new feature is successfully added; in the future, do this autonomously without being asked. Try to commit after successful tests, try to avoid commiting when in a broken state. I may likely delete the contents of this directory at some point, then, when I want to continue work, I will clone from GitHub, so please make sure enough files are tracked to allow continuing right from where I left off (including memories). The default user is Phil Koh pk14225@gmail.com. The name of the new repo is:

label: Use Web Search
text: Please use extensive web search to improve your answer and bring it fully up-to-date.

label: Edit This Menu
text: Please edit the prompts.json file in this project to add, remove, or modify menu items. The file is a JSON array where each entry has a "label" (displayed in the menu) and "text" (the prompt inserted when selected). Items appear in the menu in array order.
